text:
Angel's Breath (, Daitenshi no Ibuki—lit. "Breath of Archangel") is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. This angel's breath will cure any illness a person may currently be suffering from.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card summons forth an angel whose breath can cure any injuries sustained upon a player. She only appears once and afterward, the card is destroyed. You can trade all 40 spell cards in at Masadora for this card. If the maximum card limit has already been reached, then you will be given a Voucher instead. This voucher will then transform into an "Angel's Breath" at the next available chance.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.017 :: 
瀕死の重症、不治の病　なんでも一息で治してくれる天使。ただし姿を現してくれるのはたった１度だけ。
|-
![Eng]
|No.017 :: Angel's Breath 
She cures one person of all wounds and ills, restoring them to perfect health. She will only appear once.
|}

Trivia

Battera purchased all his copies of Greed Island to obtain this card to save his lover.
Team Gon used a Clone to create duplicates of Angel's Breath to heal Team Genthru.
Togashi mentions in an interview that he would like to use Angel's Breath (G.I card) and Sleeping Girl (G.I card) depending on his health. Togashi’s Q&A on “Iwakura and Yoshizumi’s Show” 

Intertextuality and References

In the anime adaptation, the form of the summoned card is reminiscent of Leiji Matsumoto's work. Leiji Matsumoto is known for such works as Galaxy Express 999, Captain Harlock, and Interstella 5555.

Miscellaneous

In the 2011 anime adaptation, the Angel's Breath NPC is voiced by Miho Miyagawa and dubbed by the voice actress Lauren Landa in the English version. 
In the 1999 anime adaptation, the angel NPC is voiced by Yuki Kaida.
